class.name: SKNode
class.summary: Base 2D sprite node with transform and matrix
class.details: Provides fundamental 2D transformation properties for sprite scene graph nodes. All sprite objects in the scene inherit from this component.
class.property: Position of SKNode in space of SKScene
Size of SKNode. If not specified, defaults to the size of the associated sprite or animation frame

class.name: SKScene
class.summary: Root container for a 2D sprite scene
class.details: Represents a complete 2D sprite scene that can be rendered to an SKView. Acts as the root node of the sprite scene hierarchy.

class.name: SKSpriteNode
class.summary: 2D sprite node that renders an image or animation
class.details: Renders 2D sprite content using either a static image or an animated sprite animation. Supports UV coordinates for sprite atlas sheets and various blend modes.
class.property: Primary sprite animation from a sprite atlas
Freeze animation at a specific frame index (-1 for normal playback)
UV texture coordinates for sprite atlas sampling

class.name: SKLabelNode
class.summary: 2D text label node for displaying text in sprite space
class.details: Renders text as a 2D sprite node that participates in the sprite scene hierarchy. Inherits text styling and layout from the TextBlockConcept.

class.name: SKView
class.summary: 2D viewport that renders an SKScene into the UI hierarchy
class.details: Acts as the bridge between the 2D UI system and the sprite scene hierarchy. Renders the attached SKScene using a 2D orthographic projection into its Node2D bounds.
class.property: Reference width for the sprite coordinate system
Reference height for the sprite coordinate system
